title: SonicWall Botnet Filter Command-and-Control Blocks (SonicWall)
spl:
index=netfw sourcetype="dell:sonicwall:firewall" earliest=-24h
| where match(_raw,"(?i)botnet")
| stats count by src_ip, dst_ip, cat
| where count>=10
| sort -count
description: Botnet IP feeds block C2 callbacks at line rate. Volume spikes often align with compromised endpoints phoning home.
value: Shortens containment windows by highlighting internal hosts with repeated botnet hits.
implementation: Confirm botnet database updates are logged. Enrich internal src_ip with asset owner.
visualization: Timechart (block rate), table (src_ip, botnet IP, rule).

references.title: Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk
Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference

grandmaExplanation: Botnet IP feeds block C2 callbacks at line rate — we monitor SonicWall logs so teams can act before users feel pain.
